sections.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision is an essential building block of English. Formula: Mixed revision of tenses, modals, conditionals, reported speech, vocabulary and speaking confidence. Rules: Revise all major tense forms and modal verbs learned across Days 1-73 | Recall the biggest vocabulary categories: daily life, office, professional, emotions | Speaking fluency comes from repeating full sentences aloud, not memorising isolated words | Every sentence should still follow correct subject-verb agreement
sections.formula: Mixed revision of tenses, modals, conditionals, reported speech, vocabulary and speaking confidence

examples.hindi: मैं हर दिन अंग्रेज़ी बोलने का अभ्यास करता हूँ।
examples.english: I practise speaking English every day.

examples.hindi: वह पहले से बेहतर बोलता है।
examples.english: He speaks better than before.

examples.hindi: अगर मैं मेहनत करूँ, तो सफल हो जाऊँगा।
examples.english: If I work hard, I will succeed.

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह जल्द आएगा।
examples.english: He said that he would come soon.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम आज मुझसे मिलोगे?
examples.english: Will you meet me today?

examples.hindi: मुझे यह किताब पढ़नी है।
examples.english: I have to read this book.

sections.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Mixed revision of tenses, modals, conditionals, reported speech, vocabulary and speaking confidence

examples.hindi: वह तीन साल से यहाँ काम कर रहा है।
examples.english: He has been working here for three years.

examples.hindi: तुम बहुत अच्छे इंसान हो, है ना?
examples.english: You are a very good person, aren't you?

examples.hindi: मुझे अंग्रेज़ी बोलने में आत्मविश्वास है।
examples.english: I have confidence in speaking English.

examples.hindi: मैंने अपनी गलतियों से सीखा है।
examples.english: I have learned from my mistakes.

examples.hindi: यह शब्द रोज़ के इस्तेमाल के लिए जरूरी है।
examples.english: This word is necessary for daily use.

examples.hindi: वह अच्छा व्याकरण जानता है।
examples.english: He knows good grammar.

sections.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Mixed revision of tenses, modals, conditionals, reported speech, vocabulary and speaking confidence

examples.hindi: मैं अपने विचार स्पष्ट रूप से व्यक्त करता हूँ।
examples.english: I express my thoughts clearly.

examples.hindi: यह वाक्य सही व्याकरण के साथ है।
examples.english: This sentence is with correct grammar.

examples.hindi: मुझे नई शब्दावली सीखना पसंद है।
examples.english: I like learning new vocabulary.

examples.hindi: आज मैंने पाँच नए शब्द सीखे।
examples.english: Today I learned five new words.

sections.title: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking Full Revision. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Mixed revision of tenses, modals, conditionals, reported speech, vocabulary and speaking confidence

examples.hindi: वह आत्मविश्वास से बोलता है।
examples.english: He speaks with confidence.

examples.hindi: मैं हर गलती को सुधारने की कोशिश करता हूँ।
examples.english: I try to correct every mistake.

examples.hindi: यह पूरा पाठ्यक्रम बहुत उपयोगी है।
examples.english: This entire course is very useful.

examples.hindi: मैंने पिछले पचहत्तर दिनों में बहुत कुछ सीखा।
examples.english: I have learned a lot in the last seventy-five days.
